mapper.select: SELECT cmc.*, co.name as coach_name FROM coach_my_courses cmc LEFT JOIN coach co ON cmc.coach_id = co.id ORDER BY cmc.create_time DESC
SELECT cmc.*, co.name as coach_name FROM coach_my_courses cmc LEFT JOIN coach co ON cmc.coach_id = co.id WHERE cmc.coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY cmc.create_time DESC
SELECT cmc.*, co.name as coach_name FROM coach_my_courses cmc LEFT JOIN coach co ON cmc.coach_id = co.id WHERE cmc.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coach_my_courses (coach_id, course_id, course_name, course_type, description, price, duration, difficulty_level, student_count, total_sessions, rating, status) VALUES (#{coachId}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{courseType}, #{description}, #{price}, #{duration}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{studentCount}, #{totalSessions}, #{rating}, #{status})
